closes positively by deriving the generation count at the L3 boundary layer; closes negatively if the derived count differs from three

closes positively by a derivation selecting the weight vector over the 24 orbits constrained by the 16 observable types; closes negatively if the constraint set is exhausted with no surviving weight vector, or if two inequivalent vectors survive every named constraint
